name: Butterscotch Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes
Bake Time: None
Peanut Butter chips may be substituted for the Butterscotch Chips.
1. In a double boiler over hot water, combine 1/4 cup Butter Flavor Crisco, butterscotch chips, peanut butter, and milk. Stir occasionally until the mixture is melted and smooth.
2. In a large bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs and chopped nuts. Pour the butterscotch mixture over the crumbs. Stir until combined.
3. Spread the mixture in an ungreased 9x9x2 inch pan (or line a 13x9x2 inch pan with aluminum foil to create a similar size). Refrigerate until firm. Cut into bars measuring 3/4 x 1 3/4 inches.
4. In another double boiler over hot water, combine chocolate chips and 3 tablespoons Butter Flavor Crisco. Stir occasionally until the chocolate melts.
5. Place one bar at a time in the melted chocolate. Turn with a fork to coat completely. Lift from the chocolate on the fork, allowing excess to drip off. Place on a paper-lined baking sheet. Sprinkle with finely chopped peanuts. Return to the refrigerator to let the chocolate harden.
Makes 5 to 6 dozen bars.
